description: Default command metadata for thin agent CLI model-test wrappers. Wrappers should load these defaults and delegate behavior to the shared agent CLI harness.

surfaces.agentArgumentsTemplate: --set-env OLLAMA_API_BASE={OllamaBaseUrl} --read README.md --read pyproject.toml --read app/main.py --read app/settings.py --read tests/test_main.py --message "{Prompt}" --yes-always --no-auto-commits --no-gitignore --map-tokens 0 --input-history-file "{TempDir}\aider-input-history.txt" --chat-history-file "{TempDir}\aider-chat-history.md" --no-check-update --analytics-disable --no-auto-lint --no-auto-test --line-endings lf
surfaces.writeAgentArgumentsTemplate: --set-env OLLAMA_API_BASE={OllamaBaseUrl} README.md --read pyproject.toml --read app/main.py --read app/settings.py --read tests/test_main.py --message "{Prompt}" --yes-always --no-auto-commits --no-gitignore --map-tokens 0 --input-history-file "{TempDir}\aider-input-history.txt" --chat-history-file "{TempDir}\aider-chat-history.md" --no-check-update --analytics-disable --no-auto-lint --no-auto-test --line-endings lf
surfaces.installHint: Install with pipx install aider-chat or pass the command override.
Retired upstream: do not install Roo Code for new setups. Retain this metadata only for explicit historical experiments with command/template overrides.
Install with npm install -g @kilocode/cli, generate a local-only Kilo config with setup-agent-surface, then validate only against a generated disposable sample.
Install OpenCode with npm install -g opencode-ai, generate a local-only config with setup-agent-surface, or pass the command/template override.
